description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on push events. The workflow has three jobs: check, test, and deploy. The check job runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.x, installs dependencies, checks the package, and runs pre-commit checks. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest for multiple Python versions, checks out the code, installs dependencies, and runs tests. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest if the event is a push to a tag, deploys to PyPI, creates a release, and uploads assets.
